description_long: This is a large, L-shaped desk with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a smooth, flat surface and sturdy legs. The desk has a distinctive curved inner edge, providing ergonomic access to the workspace. Its construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, finished in a uniform dark color, likely black. The desk includes a visible drawer on one side, suggesting storage functionality. The legs are reinforced with crossbars and decorative slats, enhancing both stability and visual appeal. The overall build is robust, making it suitable for heavy use in professional or home office environments.
description: A large, L-shaped black desk with a curved inner edge, sturdy legs, and a built-in drawer, designed for modern office or home use.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the left side, highlighting the solid leg structure and the extended L-shape with the curved cutout.
description_view_1: This view shows the front of the desk, revealing the drawer and the open leg space beneath the main work surface.
description_view_2: The right side of the desk is visible, emphasizing the continuous surface and the supporting legs with decorative slats.
description_view_3: The back of the desk is shown, displaying the straight rear edge and the crossbar supports connecting the legs.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the inner curve of the L-shape, with the drawer positioned at the front for easy access; the straight edges form the back and sides.
